title: Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Delhi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates:
Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honeywell India Asia Pacific Associates!
